primer:
## Capital & regulation
How much capital a bank must hold and who enforces it. Pairs the **capital & regulation vocabulary** (CET1/AT1/T2, buffers, SREP, Basel, the authorities) with the **Regulation & capital** and **Regulatory landscape** decks (ratios, buffers, output floor, the EU/Gulf supervisory map), plus **ECB / SSM & internal models** — how the ECB supervises significant banks and how internal models (IRB, IMM, IMA) are reviewed and approved.
